welcome: 👋 Hello! Welcome to Marzban Device Limiter Bot. This bot helps you manage device/IP limits for users connected to your Marzban panel.
choose_language:
🌍 Lütfen bir dil seçin:
Please choose a language:
Пожалуйста, выберите язык:
main_menu: 📋 Main Menu Choose an action from the buttons below:
banned: 🚫 Your account has been banned. Please contact the administrator.
panel_error:
❌ Connection error!

Possible causes:
• URL is incorrect or unreachable
• Wrong username or password
• Panel is offline
• SSL certificate issue

Please check your details and try again.
panel_list_empty:
📭 No panels connected.

Use the Connect Panel button.
users_empty: 📭 No users found on this panel.
user_select: Select a user to set a limit for:
limit_ask: ⚙️ How many devices should {username} be allowed?
limit_invalid: ❌ Invalid number. Please enter a positive integer.
link_invalid: ❌ Invalid link. Could not find a username in the link.
link_user_found: ✅ User found: {username} Which panel does it belong to?
status_empty: 📭 You haven't set any limits yet.
admin_ban_ask: Enter the Telegram ID of the user you want to ban:
error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
